question: Comment utiliser la couleur d'accent dans un design system ?

principles.text: Accent uniquement pour: CTAs primaires, etats actifs/selectionnes, liens, focus rings, toggles. PAS pour decoration, backgrounds non-fonctionnels. 60-30-10 rule (60% neutre, 30% secondary, 10% accent). Separer brand vs functional colors pour eviter les conflits semantiques.

sources.name: M3 Color Roles
sources.quote: Primary color is reserved for key components like FAB and prominent buttons

sources.name: EightShapes Color in Design Systems
sources.quote: Separate brand color from functional accent to avoid semantic conflicts

sources.name: WCAG 2.2 SC 1.4.11 Non-text Contrast
sources.quote: Active controls must have 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors

sources.name: Adobe Spectrum Color System
sources.quote: Accent color used sparingly for interactive elements only
